query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A close-up of pale glossy wall tiles arranged in a grid pattern separated by dark grout lines, with amorphous dark reflections and gray markings visible across the surfaces.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract, intentionally blurred close-up of pale wall tiles in a grid pattern, overwhelmed by muted faded tones and oppressive low contrast. Dense film grain and absent fine detail reduce reflections and markings to ambiguous gray smears, cultivating a pervasive atmosphere of distress and unease.
